title: Meta faces $310 billion market value drop on legal, AI concerns

title: China tech groups call for boycott of top AI conference

description: An Australian man used artificial intelligence to design a personalised experimental treatment for his dog who was sick with terminal cancer.
content:

title: S.Korea exports to rise most in nearly 5 years, imports also higher on Mideast conflict: Reuters poll
description: South Korea's March exports probably rose at the ‌strongest pace in nearly five years on a boom in chip demand fuelled by artificial intelligence investment, although the Iran war was set to drive up imports and inflation, a Reuters poll ​showed on Monday.
